updates.title: ELSS funds see ₹650 crore outflow; are tax-saving mutual funds losing relevance?
updates.summary: According to data released by the Association of Mutual Funds in India, ELSS funds recorded net outflows of  ₹650 crore in May, marking the fifth consecutive month of redemptions this year. The category has witnessed net outflows in 13 of the past 14 months.

updates.title: Death doesn't end income tax liability: Who is responsible for paying a deceased person's tax dues?
updates.summary: Tax obligations of a deceased taxpayer remain, requiring legal heirs to file returns and settle dues. Under the Income-tax Act, liability is limited to the estate's value, protecting heirs from personal financial burden beyond inherited assets.
updates.user_impact: May affect your tax liability or filing process
